name: d-code
description: Raise a small Virtual Pet inside your editor and let it accompany you while you code.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production

d-code.lcdFilter.description: LCD filter applied to the pet screen.

d-code.excludePets.description: Internal pet IDs that should never appear. Examples: 70 for Numemon line, 20 for Chuumon/Sukamon, 412 for Mamemon.

d-code.randomEggs.description: Whether to receive a random egg instead of picking one

d-code.discoverMode.description: Prioritise evolutions the user has not discovered yet.

d-code.experience.evolutionConditions.ba.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 1 (Baby I)
The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 2 (Baby II)

d-code.experience.evolutionConditions.ch.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 3 (Child)

d-code.experience.evolutionConditions.ad.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 4 (Adult)

d-code.experience.evolutionConditions.pe.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 5 (Perfect)

d-code.experience.evolutionConditions.ul.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 6 (Ultimate)
The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 7 (Ultimate+)

d-code.experience.multipliers.active.description: The amount of experience to receive by being active.

d-code.experience.multipliers.errorRemov.description: The amount of experience to receive by removing errors.

d-code.experience.multipliers.warningRem.description: The amount of experience to receive by removing warnings.

d-code.experience.multipliers.cursorStep.description: The amount of experience to receive by moving the cursor.

d-code.experience.multipliers.fileChange.description: The amount of experience to receive by changing the active file.

d-code.experience.multipliers.gitCommit.description: The amount of experience to receive by running git commits.

d-code.experience.multipliers.gitBranch.description: The amount of experience to receive by running git branches.

d-code.experience.multipliers.gitMerge.description: The amount of experience to receive by running git merges.

d-code.experience.multipliers.fileSave.description: The amount of experience to receive by saving a file.

d-code.experience.multipliers.fileSaveSt.description: The bonus experience to receive by saving a file after longer period.

d-code.experience.multipliers.terminalCo.description: The amount of experience to receive by running a command on the integrated terminal.

d-code.experience.multipliers.terminalBu.description: The amount of experience to receive by running a build or test command on the integrated terminal.

d-code.experience.multipliers.terminalTe.description: The amount of experience to receive by passing the tests on the integrated terminal.

d-code.experience.multipliers.typing.description: The amount of experience to receive by typing on the editor.

d-code.experience.multipliers.lines.description: The amount of experience to receive by adding lines on the editor.

d-code.experience.multipliers.typingStre.description: The amount of experience to receive on typing streaks.
